content: Marta Herford is a world-famous contemporary art museum in Herford, a town near Bielefeld. The building was designed by Frank Gehry.
Sparrenburg Castle is a medieval fortress and landmark of Bielefeld, constructed in the 13th century on the Teutoburg Forest ridge.
Loom Bielefeld is a major shopping center in the downtown pedestrian zone of Bielefeld, opened in 2017 with over 100 shops.
Bielefelder Berg is a pass over the Teutoburg Forest on the A2 autobahn, infamous for its highly active speed trap radar.
